core_mechanism: a category-theoretic quotient construction: organizing a class of objects into a category whose morphisms are symmetry and reduction maps, then collapsing each object along those maps to a canonical 'simplest representative' of its quotient objects (a normal-form/canonical-quotient reduction under a symmetry-morphism structure)
brief_reason: The abstract builds a category of equations whose morphisms are symmetries and reductions by symmetry groups and introduces a structure for finding the simplest representative of every quotient object, which is domain-neutrally a symmetry-driven quotient/canonical-representative construction in a category.
